name: Paid Watchlist Room Agent
description: Publishes receipt-gated daily or intraday watchlists for tokens, wallets, markets, or community research rooms.
degenPitch: Sell the watchlist, not the whole server.
whatItDoes: Builds a premium watchlist from public inputs.
Shows preview rows before paid unlock.
Verifies receipts before sending the full watchlist.
feeBehavior: Watchlist unlock fees are visible, receipt-bound, and never hidden.
cursorPrompt: Build a Paid Watchlist Room Agent using DNA x402. Show a preview, quote the full watchlist, verify receipt, unlock the full list in Telegram or Discord, and never add auto-buy behavior.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Paid Watchlist Room Agent using DNA x402. Show a preview, quote the full watchlist, verify receipt, unlock the full list in Telegram or Discord, and never add auto-buy behavior.
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt ID attaches to watchlist delivery.
